questionHtml: State the feature of Taxol that is a major challenge in its synthesis. Use section 37 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
numerous stereoisomers/chiral carbons/chiral centres/stereocentres/optical isomers ✔

NOTE: Accept exact number of chiral carbons ie 11, but do not accept just “chiral”.

meta.title: State the feature of Taxol that is a major challenge in its synthesis. Use section 37 of the data booklet.
